---
title: "Decision Records"
subtitle: "Architecture and governance decisions — append-only"
toc: false
---

::: {.chapter-chips}
<span class="chip chip-neutral no-dot">2 records</span>
<span class="chip chip-grade-a">Append-only</span>
:::

::: {.section-lead}
Architecture Decision Records capture significant, hard-to-reverse choices and *why* they were made.
They are append-only: a superseded decision is marked as such and replaced by a new record, never
edited away. This gives the project a durable memory of its own reasoning.
:::

::: {.cil-cards}
::: {.cil-card}
<div class="card-kicker">ADR-0001 · Accepted</div>
<h3>Project architecture</h3>
<p>Why the lab uses Quarto, Python, a tested <code>src/</code> core, YAML specifications, synthetic
sample data, and modular scoring functions.</p>
<span class="card-go">Read the record</span>
[](ADR-0001-project-architecture.md){.stretched-link aria-label="Open ADR-0001"}
:::

::: {.cil-card}
<div class="card-kicker">ADR-0002 · Accepted</div>
<h3>CIS as governance model</h3>
<p>Why the Commercial Intelligence Specification governs the project, and why the proposal PDF is
treated as a hypothesis source rather than final truth.</p>
<span class="card-go">Read the record</span>
[](ADR-0002-cis-as-governance-model.md){.stretched-link aria-label="Open ADR-0002"}
:::
:::

## Adding a record {.mt-section}

1. Copy an existing ADR to `ADR-XXXX-<slug>.md` (next number).
2. Use the standard headings: **Status, Context, Decision, Consequences, Alternatives considered**.
3. Link it in the cards above.
4. To change a past decision, add a new ADR that **supersedes** it and update the old one's Status.

See the [README](../../README.md) and the
[Governance section of the CIS](../../cis/commercial-intelligence-specification.md) for the full
process.
